prompt: {"type":"Japanese promotional social media thumbnail collage","style":"high-impact click-through ad design, glossy and dramatic, four-panel square layout, bold Japanese typography, saturated colors, glow effects, sparkles, gradient overlays, urgency-driven marketing visuals","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"1:1","size":"square"},"layout":{"grid":"2x2","panels":[{"position":"top-left","theme":"anxiety and self-doubt","background":"soft pink and white feminine lifestyle scene with bokeh and light textures","subject":"close-up of a worried young woman in a cozy white knit sweater, one hand near her face, hair tied in a messy bun, face partially obscured","text_blocks":[{"text":"知らないと損！","style":"yellow angled banner with black text","position":"top-left"},{"text":"99%が間違ってる","style":"very large headline, red numerals and black calligraphy-style Japanese text","position":"upper-left to center"},{"text":"その悩みの向き合い方","style":"pink subheadline","position":"below main headline"},{"text":"理由もなくモヤモヤする","style":"checklist item in white rounded box with red check icon"},{"text":"頑張ってるのに変わらない","style":"checklist item in white rounded box with red check icon"},{"text":"自分の本音がわからない","style":"checklist item in white rounded box with red check icon"},{"text":"人間関係で疲れてしまう","style":"checklist item in white rounded box with red check icon"},{"text":"将来が不安で仕方ない","style":"checklist item in white rounded box with red check icon"},{"text":"そのモヤモヤ、一人で抱えなくて大丈夫です。","style":"pink circular badge with white text","position":"lower-right"}],"count":9},{"position":"top-right","theme":"not healing but a mechanism for change","background":"deep cosmic galaxy with blue, purple, and magenta nebula, starburst lights, energy vortex, glowing spiritual atmosphere","subject":"small female figure seen from behind or side, standing near a radiant portal or column of light, face partially obscured","text_blocks":[{"text":"普通に見えて実は…","style":"white text on black angled banner","position":"top-left"},{"text":"これ、","style":"large white text","position":"upper-left"},{"text":"ヒーリング","style":"very large yellow text on dark purple brushstroke","position":"center"},{"text":"じゃありません。","style":"large white text","position":"below"},{"text":"「整える」ことで","style":"white boxed text","position":"lower-left"},{"text":"現実が変わる","style":"pink highlighted text","position":"mid-lower-left"},{"text":"仕組みがあった！","style":"white text","position":"bottom-left"}],"graphic_elements":[{"type":"curved yellow arrow","count":1,"direction":"toward glowing figure"}],"count":8},{"position":"bottom-left","theme":"returning to your true self creates a brighter future","background":"sunny blue sky with soft clouds, green field, floating leaves, bright hopeful daytime mood","subject":"joyful young woman in a sleeveless white dress, arms spread wide, body turning in the sunlight, face partially obscured","text_blocks":[{"text":"本来の自分に戻ると","style":"red and black headline","position":"top"},{"text":"こんな未来に","style":"very large gold gradient headline","position":"center"},{"text":"なります","style":"large black text","position":"right-center"},{"text":"心が軽くなり、毎日が楽しくなる","style":"benefit item in white rounded bubble with pink heart icon"},{"text":"人間関係がスムーズになり、愛で満たされる","style":"benefit item in white rounded bubble with green people icon"},{"text":"お金の流れが変わり、豊かさが自然と入ってくる","style":"benefit item in white rounded bubble with gold yen icon"},{"text":"人生が想像以上に変わり始めます！","style":"pink bottom ribbon with white text","position":"bottom"}],"count":7},{"position":"bottom-right","theme":"limited-time discount offer","background":"fiery red and gold explosion texture with glitter and spark trails, luxury urgency aesthetic","text_blocks":[{"text":"知らないと","style":"yellow brush banner with black text","position":"top-left"},{"text":"損！","style":"extremely large gold kanji with metallic bevel","position":"upper-right"},{"text":"通常価格 9,980円（税込）","style":"white price tag with crossed-out black numerals and small tax note","position":"upper-left"},{"text":"モニター価格","style":"white text","position":"center-left"},{"text":"4割引","style":"huge pink-to-white gradient discount text","position":"center-lower"},{"text":"今だけ 限定募集！ 人数限定","style":"gold circular seal badge","position":"right-center"},{"text":"詳しくはプロフィールから","style":"purple call-to-action bar with white text and white arrow button","position":"bottom"}],"count":7}],"total_panels":4},"composition":"busy, persuasive Japanese ad collage optimized for social media thumbnail visibility, each quadrant has a distinct emotional message and color identity, heavy use of diagonal banners, oversized kanji and numerals, glossy badges, rounded white info boxes, and dramatic lighting","customization":{"primary headline":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"99%が間違ってる\"}","discount text":"{argument name=\"discount text\" default=\"4割引\"}","price":"{argument name=\"price\" default=\"9,980円（税込）\"}","main color palette":"{argument name=\"main color palette\" default=\"pink, blue-purple galaxy, sky blue, red-gold\"}","call to action":"{argument name=\"call to action\" default=\"詳しくはプロフィールから\"}"},"render_notes":"make all Japanese text large and legible, with layered shadows and outlines; use polished ad-composite aesthetics rather than minimalist design; faces should be blurred or partially hidden; emphasize emotional contrast between anxiety, revelation, hopeful transformation, and urgent offer"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"日式宣传社交媒体缩略图拼图","style":"高冲击力点击率广告设计，光泽感强且具有戏剧性，四格方形布局，醒目的日文排版，饱和色彩，发光效果，闪光点，渐变叠加，强调紧迫感的营销视觉效果","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"1:1","size":"square"},"layout":{"grid":"2x2","panels":[{"position":"top-left","theme":"焦虑与自我怀疑","background":"柔和的粉色与白色女性生活场景，带有虚化效果和光影纹理","subject":"特写：一位穿着舒适白色针织衫的年轻女性，一只手靠近脸部，扎着凌乱的丸子头，面部部分遮挡","text_blocks":[{"text":"不知道就亏了！","style":"黄色斜向横幅，黑色文字","position":"top-left"},{"text":"99% 的人都错了","style":"超大标题，红色数字和黑色书法风格日文","position":"upper-left to center"},{"text":"面对烦恼的方式","style":"粉色副标题","position":"below main headline"},{"text":"无缘无故感到烦躁","style":"白色圆角框内的核对清单项，带有红色勾选图标"},{"text":"明明很努力却毫无改变","style":"白色圆角框内的核对清单项，带有红色勾选图标"},{"text":"不了解自己的真实想法","style":"白色圆角框内的核对清单项，带有红色勾选图标"},{"text":"人际关系让人疲惫","style":"白色圆角框内的核对清单项，带有红色勾选图标"},{"text":"对未来感到无比不安","style":"白色圆角框内的核对清单项，带有红色勾选图标"},{"text":"那些烦恼，不必一个人承担。","style":"粉色圆形徽章，白色文字","position":"lower-right"}],"count":9},{"position":"top-right","theme":"非治愈，而是改变的机制","background":"深邃的宇宙星系，带有蓝色、紫色和洋红色的星云，星爆光芒，能量漩涡，发光的灵性氛围","subject":"小小的女性背影或侧影，站在发光的入口或光柱旁，面部部分遮挡","text_blocks":[{"text":"看起来很普通，其实……","style":"黑色斜向横幅上的白色文字","position":"top-left"},{"text":"这，","style":"大号白色文字","position":"upper-left"},{"text":"不是","style":"深紫色笔触上的超大黄色文字","position":"center"},{"text":"治愈。","style":"大号白色文字","position":"below"},{"text":"通过“调整”","style":"白色框内文字","position":"lower-left"},{"text":"现实会改变的","style":"粉色高亮文字","position":"mid-lower-left"},{"text":"机制找到了！","style":"白色文字","position":"bottom-left"}],"graphic_elements":[{"type":"弯曲的黄色箭头","count":1,"direction":"指向发光的人物"}],"count":8},{"position":"bottom-left","theme":"回归真我创造更美好的未来","background":"阳光明媚的蓝天与柔和的云朵，绿色的田野，漂浮的叶子，明亮充满希望的白昼氛围","subject":"穿着无袖白裙的快乐年轻女性，双臂张开，在阳光下旋转，面部部分遮挡","text_blocks":[{"text":"回归真我后","style":"红黑配色标题","position":"top"},{"text":"会迎来","style":"超大金色渐变标题","position":"center"},{"text":"这样的未来","style":"大号黑色文字","position":"right-center"},{"text":"内心变得轻松，每天都充满乐趣","style":"白色圆角气泡内的收益项，带有粉色爱心图标"},{"text":"人际关系变得顺畅，充满爱意","style":"白色圆角气泡内的收益项，带有绿色人群图标"},{"text":"金钱流向改变，财富自然流入","style":"白色圆角气泡内的收益项，带有金色日元图标"},{"text":"人生将开始超乎想象的改变！","style":"粉色底部丝带，白色文字","position":"bottom"}],"count":7},{"position":"bottom-right","theme":"限时折扣优惠","background":"火红与金色的爆炸纹理，带有闪粉和火花轨迹，奢华紧迫感美学","text_blocks":[{"text":"不知道就","style":"黄色笔触横幅，黑色文字","position":"top-left"},{"text":"亏了！","style":"超大金色汉字，带有金属斜面效果","position":"upper-right"},{"text":"通常价格 9,980 日元（含税）","style":"白色价格标签，带有划掉的黑色数字和小字税费说明","position":"upper-left"},{"text":"体验价","style":"白色文字","position":"center-left"},{"text":"4 折","style":"巨大的粉色转白色渐变折扣文字","position":"center-lower"},{"text":"仅限现在！ 限定招募！ 名额有限","style":"金色圆形印章徽章","position":"right-center"},{"text":"详情请查看个人资料","style":"紫色行动呼吁栏，白色文字和白色箭头按钮","position":"bottom"}],"count":7}],"total_panels":4},"composition":"忙碌且具有说服力的日式广告拼图，针对社交媒体缩略图可见性进行了优化，每个象限都有独特的感性信息和色彩标识，大量使用对角线横幅、超大汉字和数字、光泽感徽章、圆角白色信息框以及戏剧性的灯光效果","customization":{"primary headline":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"99% 的人都错了\"}","discount text":"{argument name=\"discount text\" default=\"4 折\"}","price":"{argument name=\"price\" default=\"9,980 日元（含税）\"}","main color palette":"{argument name=\"main color palette\" default=\"粉色，蓝紫色星系，天蓝色，红金色\"}","call to action":"{argument name=\"call to action\" default=\"详情请查看个人资料\"}"},"render_notes":"确保所有日文文字大而清晰，带有分层阴影和轮廓；使用精致的广告合成美学而非极简主义设计；面部应模糊或部分遮挡；强调焦虑、启示、希望的转变与紧迫优惠之间的情感对比"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 日式四格治愈系广告拼图：一款专为教练或自我提升服务设计的醒目四象限日式宣传缩略图，适用于社交媒体帖子、个人资料链接或市场封面图。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求可读；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 杂志封面、专题页、品牌刊物、人物专访视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, grid, 2x2, layered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: minimalist, luxury]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: dramatic lighting]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
